title: Automation Skill Builder — Desktop & MCP Automation Tool
excerpt: Build desktop automations once, reuse as standalone executable. Local-first, no cloud dependency. Free to start — download for Windows & macOS.
content_html:
Local-first AI automation platform

visualbuild.me · Automation Skill Builder

Record once. Run forever — no AI required at runtime.

Use AI once to capture the workflow, then compile it into deterministic runtime logic you can rerun locally without AI in the loop.

  • Record with AI, run without AI
  • Deterministic local runtime
  • Works with Cursor, Claude & Copilot
  • Reusable as standard MCP tools

Automation Skill Builder is a local-first, self-hosted desktop & MCP automation tool: use AI once to capture a workflow, then run deterministic automations on your machine without AI in the runtime loop.

Is

  • Self-hosted control plane (local web UI + HTTP API + optional MCP)
  • Host-native automation for desktop, browser, files, APIs, vision/OCR
  • Skill packaging into reusable skills, Python, or standalone executables

Is not

  • A mandatory Hyper-V / companion-VM desktop AI agent sandbox
  • A cloud-hosted operator that must run your desktop on vendor servers
  • A hosted SaaS required online for every skill execution

WHY IT CLICKS

From repetitive manual work to reusable runtime logic

No runtime AI required

  • Repeat the same clicks and copy-paste every run
  • A human has to stay in the loop
  • Handoffs break when context is missing
  • Difficult to reuse across assistants and teammates
  • Record the workflow once with AI assistance
  • Compile it into deterministic runtime logic
  • Run it again locally in one click
Quick proof

Watch the record-once -> run-forever loop

See ASB record a browser task, turn that recording into a reusable skill, and run it again without manual cleanup.

Compatible with

  • Cursor
  • Claude
  • GitHub Copilot
  • Cline
  • Any MCP client

20 min

A 12-step SAP data export — recorded, packaged, and invokable in under 20 minutes

3 run modes

Standalone executables, AI-callable skills, and scheduled jobs — one build, same execution

0 cloud calls at runtime

Zero cloud calls at runtime — skill invocation, quota enforcement, and license validation all happen on your machine.

PROMPT EXAMPLES

Tell the AI what to do — in plain language

Paste a prompt into your MCP client. ASB executes locally — browser, desktop, ERP — and reports each step back.

amazon.com

Open amazon.com, search "iPhone 17", extract product names and prices from the results page, and save them as iphone_prices.csv on the desktop.

EXECUTING

  • Opened amazon.com
  • Searched "iPhone 17"
  • Extracted 12 product rows
  • Wrote iphone_prices.csv to Desktop
Try this example →

MCP · ASB · AI design

Use MCP ASB to enable AI design mode, record desktop steps via MCP tools (not WinMCP), save as pass_action.py, run AI parameter analysis, and package as exe.

EXECUTING

  • mcp: enable AI design · start_recording
  • wait 2s → click (1406, 257)
  • Ctrl+A → clipboard DGJW26010091 → paste
  • click (492,373) → (410,933) → (635,270) …
  • stop_recording → pass_action.py
  • mcp: ai_analyze_params (code, tip)
  • mcp: package_exe
Download ASB →

164_sap_sap · SAP GUI

Use MCP ASB tools starting with 164_sap_sap — prefer an existing connection (create one only if none exists). Open transaction ZVF04 to maintain the invoice due-date list, wait 5s, then enter sales organization 1010.

EXECUTING

  • 164_sap_sap_list_connections
  • 164_sap_sap_open · existing connection
  • Transaction ZVF04 — invoice due list
  • wait 5s
  • input sales org 1010
ERP design partner →

WHY ASB

The automation gap, solved

AI can think, but can't operate your apps

Models reason about tasks, yet they cannot click, type, or drive your desktop without a bridge.

Traditional RPA is powerful, but brittle

Classic RPA is heavy to build, fragile when UI changes, and expensive to maintain.

Simpler, smarter, reusable

Package workflows into AI-callable skills through MCP — the same path as Cursor and other assistants.

CORE CAPABILITIES

Everything your automation needs

Eight capabilities, one runtime. Build once, reuse across every assistant.

Desktop automation

Control and operate desktop applications.

Browser automation

Automate web tasks and extract data.

API calls

Connect services with structured requests.

OCR & vision

Extract text and structure from screens and files.

MCP tool surface

Expose skills to assistants via MCP.

Skill packaging

Version and reuse automations as skills.

Local execution

Run on your machine with local-first privacy.

Workflow orchestration

Chain steps into reliable automations.

TYPICAL SCENARIOS

What teams automate

FINANCE

Excel automation

Generate reports and data dashboards

ERP

SAP data updates

Automated ERP data processing

ACCOUNTING

Invoice OCR

Extract and process invoice data

DATA

Web scraping

Collect website data and content

COMMS

Email processing

Automated email workflows

RPA

RPA replay

Reproduce and monitor RPA flows

Real screens, real workflows

Swipe through real UI — workspace, recording, code, and packaging skills.

Local-first

Execution stays on your hardware.

Traceability

Logs and records for review.

Allowlists

Tighten upstream AI proxy access.

Works offline

Core automation without mandatory cloud.

Security boundaries

Guardrails for vision paths and tools.

Version 0.9.0 · Windows installer (.exe), macOS disk image (.dmg), or ZIP archives

SUBSCRIPTION LICENSE

Simple, honest pricing

Each time an AI assistant invokes a skill via MCP, that counts as 1 call. A typical automation run uses around 20–30 calls.

Start free — no credit card needed. Every account gets 1,000 calls per month at no cost, resetting on the 1st of each month (your local time). When you're ready to do more, upgrade any time.

FREE

$0

1,000 calls / month

≈ 33–50 skill runs / month

Get started

STARTER

$9 / mo

5,000 calls / month

≈ 165–250 skill runs / month

MOST POPULAR

PRO

$29 / mo

20,000 calls / month

≈ 665–1,000 skill runs / month

GROWTH

$99 / mo

100,000 calls / month

≈ 3,300–5,000 skill runs / month

ENTERPRISE

Custom

Volume · SLA · deployment & integrations

Contact us

Typical run: 20–30 calls. A skill with loops or retries may use more.

Add-on: +1,000 calls one-time for $2 · All prices USD before tax

Questions & answers

Short answers for common pre-sales and install questions.

What are the system requirements?

Summarized for operators and procurement. Pre-built desktop bundles target Windows and macOS (executable + supporting files).

Baseline (bundled app): The ZIP includes what you need to start the service—no separate Python install is required as a precondition. Use a 64-bit OS, reserve 8 GB+ RAM for heavier OCR / ML / desktop workloads, allow several GB of disk for caches on first runs, and use a current browser for the local web UI (often http://127.0.0.1:8800). Optional Python or Node.js may be needed for specific skills.

Windows

64-bit Windows 10 or later (or supported Server). Extract the ZIP and launch the packaged executable; allow prompts for permissions as documented.

WSL counts as Linux for dependencies, not Windows-native UI automation. Optional runtimes (Python, Node.js) may be required for specific skills.

macOS

Use a recent macOS release that runs the distributed bundle. Extract the ZIP and open the app; approve Accessibility / Input Monitoring when the system prompts.

Optional runtimes (Python, Node.js) may be required for specific skills; browser automation also needs MCP configuration in the app.

Linux

The Linux edition suits Debian-based environments. Because deliverables can be large, please reach out to us (or your maintainer) for details on distribution and how to obtain the build.

Headless or server deployments may require DISPLAY or --no-gui.

Is this a hosted SaaS?

No. It is designed primarily as a self-hosted application you run on your infrastructure or workstation. You control networking, TLS, and who can reach the service.

Do I need MCP or Claude community skills?

No. Core features work over the web UI and HTTP API. MCP and integration with the rich skill ecosystem on the Claude community are optional when you want assistants or a skill runtime to consume packaged capabilities. We fully support that path: use the in-app skill manager to install the skills you prefer, use the product’s built-in security checks to validate them, and execute with confidence.

Will this replace my team?

No — it amplifies what your team can do. Think of it as a capable assistant that drafts and suggests; your team reviews, decides, and owns the outcome.

What about data privacy?

Sensitive data flows depend on your configuration: local execution, which models you call, and which external services you enable. Run data-protection assessments before processing regulated data. With this product’s design, interactions are auditable and can be reviewed in a visual way—helping security teams verify behavior instead of working blind.

Why local-first?

Many automation tasks touch the desktop, filesystem, or internal APIs. Keeping execution close to the environment reduces latency and can simplify compliance—at the cost of you maintaining the runtime.

Does execution call the cloud?

At runtime, zero cloud calls — skill invocation, quota enforcement, and license validation all happen on your machine. No request goes to our AI API or any entitlement server during execution.

Paid tiers require periodic license renewal — roughly every 30 days, a small license.json file is re-issued from our website to confirm your subscription is active. This is a one-time file refresh, not a per-call network dependency.

What happens if I stay offline past my license expiry?
  • If your license is still valid (expires_at hasn't passed), you can run completely offline indefinitely until it expires.
  • If expires_at passes while offline, the app automatically falls back to the Free tier (1,000 calls/month) until you reconnect and refresh your license.
  • If you cancel your subscription but your license file hasn't expired yet, you'll continue running at your paid tier locally until expiry — this is a known trade-off of the offline-first design.

Note: like most offline license systems, this relies on your system clock being roughly accurate. We don't currently implement clock-tamper detection — this is a deliberate trade-off in favor of true offline operation.

Will VS Code, Chrome, or Office integrations be available?

Yes—see the Visual Studio Marketplace listing or download a VSIX. The Automation Skill Builder app must still run locally; extensions only embed the UI. A Microsoft Office add-in remains under evaluation.

What if OCR or vision is slow the first time?

Vision stacks often download models on first use. Expect a longer cold start; subsequent runs are typically faster. Warmup and skip flags are available in the app settings.

How do I get help?

Community users can ask questions in the public forum — response times vary. If your team needs reliable support with a guaranteed response, check out our professional plan.

Do I need Python or Node.js installed?

No. The bundled app includes what you need to start the service—no separate Python install is required as a precondition. Optional Python or Node.js may be needed for specific skills. Pre-built bundles target 64-bit Windows 10+ and recent macOS.

Support model

Two lanes—so expectations stay clear whether you are evaluating, self-hosting, or running under a commercial agreement.

Professional support

For organizations that need onboarding, priority help, custom integrations, security review assistance, or deployment hardening, commercial support may be available from the maintainer or partners.

Scope, channels, and SLAs are defined in a separate agreement—not on this marketing page. Contact your vendor or project owner for entitlement and pricing.

sentences.en: Open amazon.com, search "iPhone 17", extract product names and prices from the results page, and save them as iphone_prices.csv on the desktop.
sentences.zh: 打开 amazon.com，搜索“iPhone 17”，从结果页面中提取产品名称和价格，并将其保存为桌面上的 iphone_prices.csv。
执行
开设亚马逊网站
搜索“iPhone 17”
提取 12 个产品行
将 iphone_prices.csv 写入桌面
MCP·ASB·AI设计

blocks.html_en: Use MCP ASB to enable AI design mode, record desktop steps via MCP tools (not WinMCP), save as pass_action.py, run AI parameter analysis, and package as exe.

sentences.en: Use MCP ASB to enable AI design mode, record desktop steps via MCP tools (not WinMCP), save as pass_action.py, run AI parameter analysis, and package as exe.
sentences.zh: 使用MCP ASB启用AI设计模式，通过MCP工具（不是WinMCP）记录桌面步骤，保存为pass_action.py，运行AI参数分析，打包为exe。
执行
mcp：启用AI设计·start_recording
Ctrl+A → 剪贴板 DGJW26010091 → 粘贴
停止记录 → pass_action.py
mcp：ai_analyze_params（代码，提示）
mcp：package_exe
164_sap_sap · SAP 图形用户界面

blocks.html_en: Use MCP ASB tools starting with 164_sap_sap — prefer an existing connection (create one only if none exists). Open transaction ZVF04 to maintain the invoice due-date list, wait 5s, then enter sales organization 1010.

sentences.en: Use MCP ASB tools starting with 164_sap_sap — prefer an existing connection (create one only if none exists).
sentences.zh: 使用从 164_sap_sap 开始的 MCP ASB 工具 — 更喜欢现有连接（仅在不存在时创建一个）。

sentences.en: Open transaction ZVF04 to maintain the invoice due-date list, wait 5s, then enter sales organization 1010.
sentences.zh: 打开事务ZVF04维护发票到期清单，等待5秒，然后进入销售组织1010。
执行
164_sap_sap_open·现有连接
事务 ZVF04 — 发票到期清单
输入销售组织 1010
为什么选择ASB
自动化差距已解决

blocks.html_en: AI can think, but can't operate your apps

sentences.en: AI can think, but can't operate your apps
sentences.zh: 人工智能可以思考，但无法操作你的应用程序

blocks.html_en: Models reason about tasks, yet they cannot click, type, or drive your desktop without a bridge.

sentences.en: Models reason about tasks, yet they cannot click, type, or drive your desktop without a bridge.
sentences.zh: 模型可以推理任务，但如果没有桥，它们就无法单击、键入或驱动桌面。

blocks.html_en: Traditional RPA is powerful, but brittle

sentences.en: Traditional RPA is powerful, but brittle
sentences.zh: 传统 RPA 功能强大，但脆弱

blocks.html_en: Classic RPA is heavy to build, fragile when UI changes, and expensive to maintain.

sentences.en: Classic RPA is heavy to build, fragile when UI changes, and expensive to maintain.
sentences.zh: 经典的 RPA 构建起来很繁重，当 UI 发生变化时很脆弱，而且维护成本高昂。
更简单、更智能、可重复使用

blocks.html_en: Package workflows into AI-callable skills through MCP — the same path as Cursor and other assistants.

sentences.en: Package workflows into AI-callable skills through MCP — the same path as Cursor and other assistants.
sentences.zh: 通过 MCP 将工作流程打包成 AI 可调用的技能——与 Cursor 和其他助手的路径相同。
核心能力
您的自动化所需的一切

blocks.html_en: Eight capabilities, one runtime. Build once, reuse across every assistant.

sentences.zh: 八种功能，一种运行时间。

sentences.en: Build once, reuse across every assistant.
sentences.zh: 构建一次，在每个助手中重复使用。
桌面自动化
控制和操作桌面应用程序。
浏览器自动化

blocks.html_en: Automate web tasks and extract data.

sentences.en: Automate web tasks and extract data.
sentences.zh: 自动执行 Web 任务并提取数据。
API调用
将服务与结构化请求连接起来。
OCR 和视觉

blocks.html_en: Extract text and structure from screens and files.

sentences.en: Extract text and structure from screens and files.
sentences.zh: 从屏幕和文件中提取文本和结构。
MCP 工具表面

blocks.html_en: Expose skills to assistants via MCP.

sentences.en: Expose skills to assistants via MCP.
sentences.zh: 通过 MCP 向助手展示技能。
技能包装

blocks.html_en: Version and reuse automations as skills.

sentences.en: Version and reuse automations as skills.
sentences.zh: 将自动化版本化并重用为技能。
本地执行

blocks.html_en: Run on your machine with local-first privacy.

sentences.en: Run on your machine with local-first privacy.
sentences.zh: 以本地优先的隐私在您的计算机上运行。
工作流程编排
链条迈向可靠的自动化。
典型场景
哪些团队可以实现自动化
金融
Excel自动化
生成报告和数据仪表板
SAP数据更新
自动化 ERP 数据处理
会计
发票识别
提取和处理发票数据
网页抓取
收集网站数据和内容
电子邮件处理
自动化电子邮件工作流程
RPA 重播
重现和监控 RPA 流程
真实的屏幕，真实的工作流程

blocks.html_en: Swipe through real UI — workspace, recording, code, and packaging skills.

sentences.en: Swipe through real UI — workspace, recording, code, and packaging skills.
sentences.zh: 滑动浏览真实的 UI — 工作区、记录、代码和打包技能。
本地优先
执行保留在您的硬件上。
可追溯性
日志和记录以供审查。
允许名单
收紧上游AI代理访问。
离线工作
无需强制云的核心自动化。
安全边界

blocks.html_en: Guardrails for vision paths and tools.

sentences.en: Guardrails for vision paths and tools.
sentences.zh: 视觉路径和工具的护栏。

blocks.html_en: Version 0.9.0 · Windows installer (.exe), macOS disk image (.dmg), or ZIP archives

sentences.en: Version 0.9.0 · Windows installer (.exe), macOS disk image (.dmg), or ZIP archives
sentences.zh: 版本 0.9.0 · Windows 安装程序 (.exe)、macOS 磁盘映像 (.dmg) 或 ZIP 存档
订阅许可
简单、诚实的定价

blocks.html_en: Each time an AI assistant invokes a skill via MCP, that counts as 1 call. A typical automation run uses around 20–30 calls.

sentences.en: Each time an AI assistant invokes a skill via MCP, that counts as 1 call.
sentences.zh: 每次 AI 助手通过 MCP 调用一项技能，即算作 1 次调用。

sentences.en: A typical automation run uses around 20–30 calls.
sentences.zh: 典型的自动化运行使用大约 20-30 次调用。

blocks.html_en: Start free — no credit card needed. Every account gets 1,000 calls per month at no cost, resetting on the 1st of each month (your local time). When you're ready to do more, upgrade any time.

sentences.en: Start free — no credit card needed.
sentences.zh: 免费开始——无需信用卡。

sentences.en: Every account gets 1,000 calls per month at no cost, resetting on the 1st of each month (your local time).
sentences.zh: 每个帐户每月可免费拨打 1,000 次电话，并于每月 1 日（您的当地时间）重置。

sentences.en: When you're ready to do more, upgrade any time.
sentences.zh: 当您准备好执行更多操作时，请随时升级。
每月 1,000 通电话
≈ 33–50 次技能运行/月
起动机
每月 5,000 通电话
≈ 165–250 次技能运行/月
每月 20,000 通电话
生长
每月 100,000 次呼叫
企业
风俗
数量 · SLA · 部署和集成

blocks.html_en: Typical run: 20–30 calls. A skill with loops or retries may use more.

sentences.zh: 典型运行：20-30 次调用。

sentences.en: A skill with loops or retries may use more.
sentences.zh: 具有循环或重试的技能可能会使用更多。

blocks.html_en: Add-on: +1,000 calls one-time for $2 · All prices USD before tax

sentences.en: Add-on: +1,000 calls one-time for $2 · All prices USD before tax
sentences.zh: 附加服务：一次性 +1,000 次通话，只需 2 美元 · 所有价格均为税前美元
问题与解答

blocks.html_en: Short answers for common pre-sales and install questions.

sentences.en: Short answers for common pre-sales and install questions.
sentences.zh: 常见售前和安装问题的简短解答。

blocks.html_en: Summarized for operators and procurement. Pre-built desktop bundles target Windows and macOS (executable + supporting files).

sentences.zh: 为运营商和采购人员总结。

sentences.en: Pre-built desktop bundles target Windows and macOS (executable + supporting files).
sentences.zh: 预构建的桌面捆绑包面向 Windows 和 macOS（可执行文件 + 支持文件）。

blocks.html_en: Baseline (bundled app): The ZIP includes what you need to start the service—no separate Python install is required as a precondition. Use a 64-bit OS, reserve 8 GB+ RAM for heavier OCR / ML / desktop workloads, allow several GB of disk for caches on first runs, and use a current browser for the local web UI (often http://127.0.0.1:8800). Optional Python or Node.js may be needed for specific skills.

sentences.en: Baseline (bundled app): The ZIP includes what you need to start the service—no separate Python install is required as a precondition.
sentences.zh: 基线（捆绑应用程序）：ZIP 包含启动服务所需的内容 - 不需要单独安装 Python 作为先决条件。

sentences.en: Use a 64-bit OS, reserve 8 GB+ RAM for heavier OCR / ML / desktop workloads, allow several GB of disk for caches on first runs, and use a current browser for the local web UI (often http://127.0.0.1:8800). Optional Python or Node.js may be needed for specific skills.
sentences.zh: 使用 64 位操作系统，为较重的 OCR / ML / 桌面工作负载预留 8 GB 以上 RAM，在首次运行时允许使用几 GB 磁盘用于缓存，并使用当前浏览器作为本地 Web UI（通常为 http://127.0.0.1:8800）。特定技能可能需要可选的 Python 或 Node.js。
视窗

blocks.html_en: 64-bit Windows 10 or later (or supported Server). Extract the ZIP and launch the packaged executable; allow prompts for permissions as documented.

sentences.zh: 64 位 Windows 10 或更高版本（或支持的服务器）。

sentences.en: Extract the ZIP and launch the packaged executable; allow prompts for permissions as documented.
sentences.zh: 解压 ZIP 并启动打包的可执行文件；允许按照记录提示权限。

blocks.html_en: WSL counts as Linux for dependencies, not Windows-native UI automation. Optional runtimes (Python, Node.js) may be required for specific skills.

sentences.en: WSL counts as Linux for dependencies, not Windows-native UI automation.
sentences.zh: WSL 算作 Linux 的依赖项，而不是 Windows 原生的 UI 自动化。

sentences.en: Optional runtimes (Python, Node.js) may be required for specific skills.
sentences.zh: 特定技能可能需要可选运行时（Python、Node.js）。

blocks.html_en: Use a recent macOS release that runs the distributed bundle. Extract the ZIP and open the app; approve Accessibility / Input Monitoring when the system prompts.

sentences.en: Use a recent macOS release that runs the distributed bundle.
sentences.zh: 使用运行分布式捆绑包的最新 macOS 版本。

sentences.en: Extract the ZIP and open the app; approve Accessibility / Input Monitoring when the system prompts.
sentences.zh: 解压 ZIP 并打开应用程序；当系统提示时批准辅助功能/输入监控。

blocks.html_en: Optional runtimes (Python, Node.js) may be required for specific skills; browser automation also needs MCP configuration in the app.

sentences.en: Optional runtimes (Python, Node.js) may be required for specific skills; browser automation also needs MCP configuration in the app.
sentences.zh: 特定技能可能需要可选运行时（Python、Node.js）；浏览器自动化还需要应用程序中的 MCP 配置。

blocks.html_en: The Linux edition suits Debian-based environments. Because deliverables can be large, please reach out to us (or your maintainer) for details on distribution and how to obtain the build.

sentences.en: The Linux edition suits Debian-based environments.
sentences.zh: Linux 版本适合基于 Debian 的环境。

sentences.en: Because deliverables can be large, please reach out to us (or your maintainer) for details on distribution and how to obtain the build.
sentences.zh: 由于可交付成果可能很大，请联系我们（或您的维护人员）以获取有关分发以及如何获取构建版本的详细信息。

blocks.html_en: Headless or server deployments may require DISPLAY or --no-gui.

sentences.en: Headless or server deployments may require DISPLAY or --no-gui.
sentences.zh: 无头或服务器部署可能需要 DISPLAY 或 --no-gui。

blocks.html_en: No. It is designed primarily as a self-hosted application you run on your infrastructure or workstation. You control networking, TLS, and who can reach the service.

sentences.en: No. It is designed primarily as a self-hosted application you run on your infrastructure or workstation.
sentences.zh: 不会。它主要设计为在基础设施或工作站上运行的自托管应用程序。

sentences.en: You control networking, TLS, and who can reach the service.
sentences.zh: 您可以控制网络、TLS 以及谁可以访问该服务。

blocks.html_en: No. Core features work over the web UI and HTTP API. MCP and integration with the rich skill ecosystem on the Claude community are optional when you want assistants or a skill runtime to consume packaged capabilities. We fully support that path: use the in-app skill manager to install the skills you prefer, use the product’s built-in security checks to validate them, and execute with confidence.

sentences.en: No. Core features work over the web UI and HTTP API.
sentences.zh: 不会。核心功能通过 Web UI 和 HTTP API 运行。

sentences.en: MCP and integration with the rich skill ecosystem on the Claude community are optional when you want assistants or a skill runtime to consume packaged capabilities.
sentences.zh: 当您希望助手或技能运行时使用打包功能时，MCP 以及与 Claude 社区丰富的技能生态系统的集成是可选的。

sentences.en: We fully support that path: use the in-app skill manager to install the skills you prefer, use the product’s built-in security checks to validate them, and execute with confidence.
sentences.zh: 我们完全支持该路径：使用应用内技能管理器安装您喜欢的技能，使用产品的内置安全检查来验证它们，并充满信心地执行。

blocks.html_en: No — it amplifies what your team can do. Think of it as a capable assistant that drafts and suggests; your team reviews, decides, and owns the outcome.

sentences.en: No — it amplifies what your team can do.
sentences.zh: 不——它扩大了你的团队的能力。

sentences.en: Think of it as a capable assistant that drafts and suggests; your team reviews, decides, and owns the outcome.
sentences.zh: 将其视为起草和建议的得力助手；您的团队审查、决定并拥有结果。

blocks.html_en: Sensitive data flows depend on your configuration: local execution, which models you call, and which external services you enable. Run data-protection assessments before processing regulated data. With this product’s design, interactions are auditable and can be reviewed in a visual way—helping security teams verify behavior instead of working blind.

sentences.en: Sensitive data flows depend on your configuration: local execution, which models you call, and which external services you enable.
sentences.zh: 敏感数据流取决于您的配置：本地执行、您调用的模型以及您启用的外部服务。

sentences.en: Run data-protection assessments before processing regulated data.
sentences.zh: 在处理受监管的数据之前运行数据保护评估。

sentences.en: With this product’s design, interactions are auditable and can be reviewed in a visual way—helping security teams verify behavior instead of working blind.
sentences.zh: 通过该产品的设计，交互是可审核的，并且可以以可视化方式进行审查，从而帮助安全团队验证行为而不是盲目工作。

blocks.html_en: Many automation tasks touch the desktop, filesystem, or internal APIs. Keeping execution close to the environment reduces latency and can simplify compliance—at the cost of you maintaining the runtime.

sentences.en: Many automation tasks touch the desktop, filesystem, or internal APIs.
sentences.zh: 许多自动化任务涉及桌面、文件系统或内部 API。

sentences.en: Keeping execution close to the environment reduces latency and can simplify compliance—at the cost of you maintaining the runtime.
sentences.zh: 保持执行靠近环境可以减少延迟并简化合规性，但代价是维护运行时。

blocks.html_en: At runtime, zero cloud calls — skill invocation, quota enforcement, and license validation all happen on your machine. No request goes to our AI API or any entitlement server during execution.

sentences.en: At runtime, zero cloud calls — skill invocation, quota enforcement, and license validation all happen on your machine.
sentences.zh: 在运行时，零云调用——技能调用、配额执行和许可证验证都发生在您的计算机上。

sentences.en: No request goes to our AI API or any entitlement server during execution.
sentences.zh: 执行期间不会有任何请求发送至我们的 AI API 或任何授权服务器。

blocks.html_en: Paid tiers require periodic license renewal — roughly every 30 days, a small license.json file is re-issued from our website to confirm your subscription is active. This is a one-time file refresh, not a per-call network dependency.

sentences.en: Paid tiers require periodic license renewal — roughly every 30 days, a small license.json file is re-issued from our website to confirm your subscription is active.
sentences.zh: 付费套餐需要定期续订许可证 - 大约每 30 天，我们的网站就会重新发布一个小型的 license.json 文件，以确认您的订阅处于活动状态。

sentences.en: This is a one-time file refresh, not a per-call network dependency.
sentences.zh: 这是一次性文件刷新，而不是每次调用的网络依赖性。

blocks.html_en: • If your license is still valid (expires_at hasn't passed), you can run completely offline indefinitely until it expires.

sentences.en: If your license is still valid (expires_at hasn't passed), you can run completely offline indefinitely until it expires.
sentences.zh: 如果您的许可证仍然有效（expires_at 尚未通过），您可以无限期地完全离线运行，直到其过期。

blocks.html_en: • If expires_at passes while offline, the app automatically falls back to the Free tier (1,000 calls/month) until you reconnect and refresh your license.

sentences.en: If expires_at passes while offline, the app automatically falls back to the Free tier (1,000 calls/month) until you reconnect and refresh your license.
sentences.zh: 如果在离线状态下过期，应用程序会自动回退到免费套餐（每月 1,000 次调用），直到您重新连接并刷新许可证。

blocks.html_en: • If you cancel your subscription but your license file hasn't expired yet, you'll continue running at your paid tier locally until expiry — this is a known trade-off of the offline-first design.

sentences.en: If you cancel your subscription but your license file hasn't expired yet, you'll continue running at your paid tier locally until expiry — this is a known trade-off of the offline-first design.
sentences.zh: 如果您取消订阅但您的许可证文件尚未过期，您将继续在本地付费级别运行直到过期 - 这是离线优先设计的已知权衡。

blocks.html_en: Note: like most offline license systems, this relies on your system clock being roughly accurate. We don't currently implement clock-tamper detection — this is a deliberate trade-off in favor of true offline operation.

sentences.en: Note: like most offline license systems, this relies on your system clock being roughly accurate.
sentences.zh: 注意：与大多数离线许可系统一样，这依赖于您的系统时钟大致准确。

sentences.en: We don't currently implement clock-tamper detection — this is a deliberate trade-off in favor of true offline operation.
sentences.zh: 我们目前没有实现时钟篡改检测——这是为了支持真正的离线操作而故意进行的权衡。

blocks.html_en: Yes—see the Visual Studio Marketplace listing or download a VSIX. The Automation Skill Builder app must still run locally; extensions only embed the UI. A Microsoft Office add-in remains under evaluation.

sentences.en: Yes—see the Visual Studio Marketplace listing or download a VSIX.
sentences.zh: 是 - 请参阅 Visual Studio Marketplace 列表或下载 VSIX。

sentences.en: The Automation Skill Builder app must still run locally; extensions only embed the UI.
sentences.zh: Automation Skill Builder 应用程序仍必须在本地运行；扩展仅嵌入 UI。

sentences.en: A Microsoft Office add-in remains under evaluation.
sentences.zh: Microsoft Office 加载项仍在评估中。

blocks.html_en: Vision stacks often download models on first use. Expect a longer cold start; subsequent runs are typically faster. Warmup and skip flags are available in the app settings.

sentences.en: Vision stacks often download models on first use.
sentences.zh: 视觉堆栈通常在首次使用时下载模型。

sentences.en: Expect a longer cold start; subsequent runs are typically faster.
sentences.zh: 预计冷启动时间更长；后续运行通常会更快。

sentences.en: Warmup and skip flags are available in the app settings.
sentences.zh: 应用程序设置中提供了预热和跳过标志。

blocks.html_en: Community users can ask questions in the public forum — response times vary. If your team needs reliable support with a guaranteed response, check out our professional plan.

sentences.en: Community users can ask questions in the public forum — response times vary.
sentences.zh: 社区用户可以在公共论坛中提问 - 响应时间各不相同。

sentences.en: If your team needs reliable support with a guaranteed response, check out our professional plan.
sentences.zh: 如果您的团队需要可靠的支持和有保证的响应，请查看我们的专业计划。

blocks.html_en: No. The bundled app includes what you need to start the service—no separate Python install is required as a precondition. Optional Python or Node.js may be needed for specific skills. Pre-built bundles target 64-bit Windows 10+ and recent macOS.

sentences.en: No. The bundled app includes what you need to start the service—no separate Python install is required as a precondition.
sentences.zh: 不需要。捆绑的应用程序包含启动服务所需的内容 - 不需要单独安装 Python 作为先决条件。

sentences.en: Optional Python or Node.js may be needed for specific skills.
sentences.zh: 特定技能可能需要可选的 Python 或 Node.js。

sentences.en: Pre-built bundles target 64-bit Windows 10+ and recent macOS.
sentences.zh: 预构建的捆绑包针对 64 位 Windows 10+ 和最新的 macOS。
支持型号

blocks.html_en: Two lanes—so expectations stay clear whether you are evaluating, self-hosting, or running under a commercial agreement.

sentences.en: Two lanes—so expectations stay clear whether you are evaluating, self-hosting, or running under a commercial agreement.
sentences.zh: 两条通道——无论您是在评估、自行托管还是在商业协议下运行，期望都保持清晰。
专业支持

blocks.html_en: For organizations that need onboarding, priority help, custom integrations, security review assistance, or deployment hardening, commercial support may be available from the maintainer or partners.

sentences.en: For organizations that need onboarding, priority help, custom integrations, security review assistance, or deployment hardening, commercial support may be available from the maintainer or partners.
sentences.zh: 对于需要入职、优先帮助、自定义集成、安全审查帮助或部署强化的组织，维护人员或合作伙伴可能会提供商业支持。

blocks.html_en: Scope, channels, and SLAs are defined in a separate agreement—not on this marketing page. Contact your vendor or project owner for entitlement and pricing.

sentences.en: Scope, channels, and SLAs are defined in a separate agreement—not on this marketing page.
sentences.zh: 范围、渠道和 SLA 在单独的协议中定义，而不是在此营销页面上。

sentences.en: Contact your vendor or project owner for entitlement and pricing.
sentences.zh: 请联系您的供应商或项目所有者了解权利和定价。

content_html_zh:
本地优先的人工智能自动化平台

Visualbuild.me · 自动化技能构建器

记录一次。 永远运行——运行时不需要人工智能。

使用 AI 一次捕获工作流程，然后将其编译为确定性运行时逻辑，您可以在本地重新运行，而无需循环中的 AI。

  • 有AI记录，无AI运行
  • 确定性本地运行时
  • 与 Cursor、Claude 和 Copilot 一起工作
  • 可作为标准 MCP 工具重复使用

Automation Skill Builder 是一种本地优先、自托管桌面和 MCP 自动化工具：使用 AI 一次来捕获工作流程，然后在运行时循环中无需 AI 的情况下在计算机上运行确定性自动化。

Is

  • 自托管控制平面（本地 Web UI + HTTP API + 可选 MCP）
  • 适用于桌面、浏览器、文件、API、视觉/OCR 的主机本机自动化
  • 技能打包成可重用技能、Python 或独立可执行文件

Is not

  • 强制性的 Hyper-V / 配套虚拟机桌面 AI 代理沙箱
  • 必须在供应商服务器上运行桌面的云托管运营商
  • 每项技能执行都需要在线托管 SaaS

为什么它会点击

从重复的手动工作到可重用的运行时逻辑

无需运行时 AI

  • 每次运行时重复相同的点击和复制粘贴

  • 难以在助理和队友之间重用
  • 在 AI 辅助下记录一次工作流程
  • 将其编译为确定性运行时逻辑

提示示例

用简单的语言告诉人工智能该做什么

将提示粘贴到您的 MCP 客户端中。 ASB 在本地执行（浏览器、桌面、ERP）并报告每一步。

amazon.com

打开 amazon.com，搜索“iPhone 17”，从结果页面中提取产品名称和价格，并将其保存为桌面上的 iphone_prices.csv。

执行

  • 开设亚马逊网站
  • 搜索“iPhone 17”
  • 提取 12 个产品行
  • 将 iphone_prices.csv 写入桌面

MCP·ASB·AI设计

使用MCP ASB启用AI设计模式，通过MCP工具（不是WinMCP）记录桌面步骤，保存为pass_action.py，运行AI参数分析，打包为exe。

执行

  • mcp：启用AI设计·start_recording
  • 等待 2 秒 → 单击 (1406, 257)
  • Ctrl+A → 剪贴板 DGJW26010091 → 粘贴
  • click (492,373) → (410,933) → (635,270) …
  • 停止记录 → pass_action.py
  • mcp：ai_analyze_params（代码，提示）
  • mcp：package_exe
Download ASB →

164_sap_sap · SAP 图形用户界面

使用从 164_sap_sap 开始的 MCP ASB 工具 — 更喜欢现有连接（仅在不存在时创建一个）。 打开事务ZVF04维护发票到期清单，等待5秒，然后进入销售组织1010。

执行

  • 164_sap_sap_list_connections
  • 164_sap_sap_open·现有连接
  • 事务 ZVF04 — 发票到期清单
  • wait 5s
  • 输入销售组织 1010

问题与解答

常见售前和安装问题的简短解答。

What are the system requirements?

为运营商和采购人员总结。 预构建的桌面捆绑包面向 Windows 和 macOS（可执行文件 + 支持文件）。

基线（捆绑应用程序）：ZIP 包含启动服务所需的内容 - 不需要单独安装 Python 作为先决条件。 使用 64 位操作系统，为较重的 OCR / ML / 桌面工作负载预留 8 GB 以上 RAM，在首次运行时允许使用几 GB 磁盘用于缓存，并使用当前浏览器作为本地 Web UI（通常为 http://127.0.0.1:8800）。特定技能可能需要可选的 Python 或 Node.js。

视窗

64 位 Windows 10 或更高版本（或支持的服务器）。 解压 ZIP 并启动打包的可执行文件；允许按照记录提示权限。

WSL 算作 Linux 的依赖项，而不是 Windows 原生的 UI 自动化。 特定技能可能需要可选运行时（Python、Node.js）。

macOS

使用运行分布式捆绑包的最新 macOS 版本。 解压 ZIP 并打开应用程序；当系统提示时批准辅助功能/输入监控。

特定技能可能需要可选运行时（Python、Node.js）；浏览器自动化还需要应用程序中的 MCP 配置。

Linux

Linux 版本适合基于 Debian 的环境。 由于可交付成果可能很大，请联系我们（或您的维护人员）以获取有关分发以及如何获取构建版本的详细信息。

无头或服务器部署可能需要 DISPLAY 或 --no-gui。

Is this a hosted SaaS?

不会。它主要设计为在基础设施或工作站上运行的自托管应用程序。 您可以控制网络、TLS 以及谁可以访问该服务。

Do I need MCP or Claude community skills?

不会。核心功能通过 Web UI 和 HTTP API 运行。 当您希望助手或技能运行时使用打包功能时，MCP 以及与 Claude 社区丰富的技能生态系统的集成是可选的。 我们完全支持该路径：使用应用内技能管理器安装您喜欢的技能，使用产品的内置安全检查来验证它们，并充满信心地执行。

Will this replace my team?

不——它扩大了你的团队的能力。 将其视为起草和建议的得力助手；您的团队审查、决定并拥有结果。

What about data privacy?

敏感数据流取决于您的配置：本地执行、您调用的模型以及您启用的外部服务。 在处理受监管的数据之前运行数据保护评估。 通过该产品的设计，交互是可审核的，并且可以以可视化方式进行审查，从而帮助安全团队验证行为而不是盲目工作。

Why local-first?

许多自动化任务涉及桌面、文件系统或内部 API。 保持执行靠近环境可以减少延迟并简化合规性，但代价是维护运行时。

Does execution call the cloud?

在运行时，零云调用——技能调用、配额执行和许可证验证都发生在您的计算机上。 执行期间不会有任何请求发送至我们的 AI API 或任何授权服务器。

付费套餐需要定期续订许可证 - 大约每 30 天，我们的网站就会重新发布一个小型的 license.json 文件，以确认您的订阅处于活动状态。 这是一次性文件刷新，而不是每次调用的网络依赖性。

What happens if I stay offline past my license expiry?
  • 如果您的许可证仍然有效（expires_at 尚未通过），您可以无限期地完全离线运行，直到其过期。
  • 如果在离线状态下过期，应用程序会自动回退到免费套餐（每月 1,000 次调用），直到您重新连接并刷新许可证。
  • 如果您取消订阅但您的许可证文件尚未过期，您将继续在本地付费级别运行直到过期 - 这是离线优先设计的已知权衡。

注意：与大多数离线许可系统一样，这依赖于您的系统时钟大致准确。 我们目前没有实现时钟篡改检测——这是为了支持真正的离线操作而故意进行的权衡。

Will VS Code, Chrome, or Office integrations be available?

是 - 请参阅 Visual Studio Marketplace 列表或下载 VSIX。 Automation Skill Builder 应用程序仍必须在本地运行；扩展仅嵌入 UI。 Microsoft Office 加载项仍在评估中。

What if OCR or vision is slow the first time?

视觉堆栈通常在首次使用时下载模型。 预计冷启动时间更长；后续运行通常会更快。 应用程序设置中提供了预热和跳过标志。

How do I get help?

社区用户可以在公共论坛中提问 - 响应时间各不相同。 如果您的团队需要可靠的支持和有保证的响应，请查看我们的专业计划。

Do I need Python or Node.js installed?

不需要。捆绑的应用程序包含启动服务所需的内容 - 不需要单独安装 Python 作为先决条件。 特定技能可能需要可选的 Python 或 Node.js。 预构建的捆绑包针对 64 位 Windows 10+ 和最新的 macOS。

支持型号

两条通道——无论您是在评估、自行托管还是在商业协议下运行，期望都保持清晰。

专业支持

对于需要入职、优先帮助、自定义集成、安全审查帮助或部署强化的组织，维护人员或合作伙伴可能会提供商业支持。

范围、渠道和 SLA 在单独的协议中定义，而不是在此营销页面上。 请联系您的供应商或项目所有者了解权利和定价。
